All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AllianceFlipUtil
Utility class for flipping geometric coordinates between alliance perspectives in FRC.
AllianceFlipUtil.SymmetryType
Enumeration of field symmetry types for alliance coordinate transformation.
ArmMech
Mechanism implementation for a single-jointed arm with position, velocity, and duty control.
ArmMech.ControlMode
Control modes for the arm mechanism
Auto
Base class for autonomous routines that load Choreo trajectories and expose common path utilities.
AutoManager
Singleton manager for autonomous routine selection and visualization.
CamConstants
 
ChassisRequest
Container for all the Swerve Requests.
ChassisRequest.ApplyChassisSpeeds
Accepts a generic ChassisSpeeds to apply to the drivetrain.
ChassisRequest.ApplyFieldSpeeds
Accepts a generic Field Relative ChassisSpeeds to apply to the drivetrain.
ChassisRequest.ChassisRequestParameters
Contains everything the control requests need to calculate the module state.
ChassisRequest.FieldCentric
Drives the swerve drivetrain in a field-centric manner.
ChassisRequest.FieldCentricFacingAngle
Drives the swerve drivetrain in a field-centric manner, maintaining a specified heading angle to ensure the robot is facing the desired direction
ChassisRequest.Idle
Does nothing to the swerve module state.
ChassisRequest.PointWheelsAt
Sets the swerve drive modules to point to a specified direction.
ChassisRequest.RobotCentric
Drives the swerve drivetrain in a robot-centric manner.
ChassisRequest.RobotCentricFacingAngle
Applies robot-relative chassis speeds while maintaining a field-centric facing angle.
ChassisRequest.SwerveDriveBrake
Sets the swerve drive module states to point inward on the robot in an "X" fashion, creating a natural brake which will oppose any motion.
ChassisRequest.XPositiveReference
The reference for "forward" is sometimes different if you're talking about field relative.
ChoreoEventMarker
Wrapper class for tracking Choreo event markers with their passed state.
ChoreoEventTracker
Tracks and manages Choreo trajectory event markers using a HashMap.
CircularRegion
This class models a region of the field.
ConcurrentFifoQueue<T>
 
ConstantsLoader
 
Elastic
 
Elastic.Notification
Represents an notification object to be sent to the Elastic dashboard.
Elastic.Notification.NotificationLevel
Represents the possible levels of notifications for the Elastic dashboard.
ElevatorMech
Mechanism implementation for elevators with position, velocity, and duty cycle control.
ElevatorMech.ControlMode
Control modes for the elevator mechanism
FlywheelMech
Mechanism implementation for flywheels with velocity and duty cycle control.
FlywheelMech.ControlMode
Control modes for the flywheel mechanism
FxMotorConfig
 
FxMotorConfig.FxMotorType
 
GeomUtil
Geometry utilities for working with translations, rotations, transforms, and poses.
GitLogger
 
GrappleTof
 
Gyro
 
JSONReader
 
LaunchTrajectory
 
MechBase
Base class for mechanism IO implementations with common motor configuration helpers.
Module
Base class for swerve modules with drive and steer control.
Module.DriveControlMode
Drive motor control mode selection.
Module.SteerControlMode
Steer motor control mode selection.
ModuleTalonFX
TalonFX-based swerve module implementation with optional simulation support.
ModuleType
Known swerve module gear ratio presets with metadata used for configuration.
MwConstants
 
MWPreferences
 
MwSubsystem<StateType extends Enum<StateType>,ConstantsType extends MwConstants>
 
MwSubsystemBase
 
MwVisionSim
Handles PhotonVision simulation for generating vision data in simulation mode.
MwVisionSim.CameraSimulation
Represents a single simulated camera with its properties and transform.
NumUtil
 
OdomPacket
Packet handler for robot odometry data.
OdomPacket.OdometryData
Data structure containing robot odometry information.
Packet
Base interface for all proxy server packet types.
Packet.Timestamp
Timestamp class to store packet timestamp and perform timestamp operations.
PhoenixOdometryThread
Provides an interface for asynchronously reading high-frequency measurements to a set of queues.
PhoenixUtil
 
PhoenixUtil.TalonFXMotorControllerSim
 
PhoenixUtil.TalonFXMotorControllerWithRemoteCancoderSim
 
PieceDetectionPacket
Packet handler for game piece detection data.
PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData
Data structure containing game piece detection information.
Pigeon2Gyro
IO implementation for Pigeon 2.
PolygonRegion
This class models a region of the field.
ProxyServerThread
Proxy server thread for handling UDP communication with external systems.
PwfTof
 
Region
This class models a region of the field.
RollerMech
Mechanism implementation for rollers with position, velocity, and duty cycle control.
RollerMech.ControlMode
Control modes for the roller mechanism
Spline
 
Spline2d
 
SplineUtil
 
StatesPacket
Packet handler for swerve drive module state data.
StatesPacket.ModuleStatesData
Data structure containing swerve module state information.
SubsystemIO<ConstantsType extends MwConstants>
 
SubsystemIoBase
 
SubsystemManager
 
SwerveDriveConfig
Immutable configuration container for a full swerve drivetrain.
SwerveMeasurements
Data containers for time-stamped swerve odometry measurements.
SwerveMeasurements.GyroMeasurement
Time-stamped gyro measurement.
SwerveMeasurements.ModuleMeasurement
Time-stamped module position measurement.
SwerveMeasurements.SwerveMeasurement
Aggregated time-stamped swerve measurement bundle.
SwerveMech
Mechanism implementation for a four-module swerve drivetrain.
SwerveModuleConfig
Configuration container for a single swerve module.
SwerveModuleConfig.EncoderType
Encoder hardware options for the module.
TagLayouts
 
TagSolutionPacket
Packet handler for AprilTag detection and pose estimation data.
TagSolutionPacket.TagSolutionData
Data structure containing AprilTag-based pose solution information.
TightRope
 
TimesyncRequest
Packet handler for time synchronization requests.
TimesyncRequest.TimesyncRequestData
Data structure containing time synchronization request information.
TimesyncResponse
Packet handler for time synchronization responses.
TimesyncResponse.TimesyncResponseData
Data structure containing time synchronization response information.
Tof
 
Tof.RangeMode
 
TunablePid
 
TurretMech
Roller-based mechanism configured for turret control.
Waypoint
